query:
SELECT 
  oi.id, 
  oi.productId, 
  p.name as productName, 
  p.imageUrl,
  pv.variantCode
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON oi.variantId = pv.id
LEFT JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE oi.orderId = 180003
LIMIT 5;
